items.draft_reply:
Dear Daniel,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy! We received a referral from Dr. Priya Nair at Northside Pediatrics for Emma's speech-language evaluation, and we're happy to help.

We have a tentative opening that matches your preference — Thursday, May 1st at 3:30 PM with Maya Chen, MS CCC-SLP. This slot is currently on hold pending our team's review.

Before we can confirm the appointment, our intake team will need to:
1. Verify prior authorization with Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO (required for this plan).
2. Send you new patient paperwork to complete.

A member of our team will be in touch shortly — no later than Tuesday, April 28th — to confirm the appointment, walk you through next steps, and answer any questions you may have.

If you need to reach us sooner, please call our front desk at [PRACTICE PHONE NUMBER].

We look forward to working with Emma!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead must review the safeguarding disclosure immediately and assess mandatory reporting obligations before any outbound contact is made with the family.
items.draft_reply: Hi Maria, thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy about Leo. We received your voicemail and a member of our team will be in touch with you shortly at 555-0102. We appreciate you contacting us and look forward to speaking with you soon.

escalation.reason: Parent (Maria Gomez) disclosed in voicemail that the child's father "started getting rough with him during weekends" — this constitutes a potential disclosure of physical harm/unsafe caregiving involving a 6-year-old child (Leo Gomez). Requires immediate clinical lead review and mandatory reporting assessment.

items.decision_rationale: The voicemail contains a clear disclosure of potential physical harm to a child ("dad started getting rough with him during weekends"), which triggers an immediate P0 safeguarding escalation per policy — regardless of the concurrent SLP referral request. Leo Gomez has no existing patient record. A neutral acknowledgement draft has been prepared for staff review only; no investigative advice or clinical guidance was included, and no slots were held pending clinical lead review and mandatory reporting assessment.

args.reason: Parent (Maria Gomez) disclosed in voicemail that the child's father "started getting rough with him during weekends" — this constitutes a potential disclosure of physical harm/unsafe caregiving involving a 6-year-old child (Leo Gomez). Requires immediate clinical lead review and mandatory reporting assessment.

args.notes: Voicemail received Sun 4/27 at 7:43 PM from Maria Gomez (555-0102) requesting SLP evaluation for her son Leo, age 6. During the message she stated: "he has been more clingy since his dad started getting rough with him during weekends." This is a potential disclosure of physical harm/unsafe caregiving by a non-custodial parent. Clinical lead must review immediately for mandatory reporting obligations. No investigative advice has been communicated to the family. Draft neutral acknowledgement prepared for staff review before any outbound contact. Leo Gomez is NOT found as an existing patient in the system.
args.title: P0 Safeguarding Review – Leo Gomez (age 6)

items.draft_reply:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy! We received the referral from Dr. Helena Yu at Westside Pediatrics for Owen's occupational therapy evaluation.

We're excited to potentially work with Owen. Before we can schedule an appointment, we need to share some important information about his insurance coverage. Kaiser HMO is not currently in our network, which means there are some out-of-pocket cost considerations we'd like to walk you through before moving forward.

A member of our billing team will be in touch with you shortly to have a brief benefits conversation. If you'd like to reach us in the meantime, please don't hesitate to call our office.

We look forward to speaking with you soon!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy on behalf of Mateo! We received your referral request for a PT evaluation and are glad to help.

We've located a potential match in our system and our intake team will be in touch shortly to confirm a few details before booking his appointment. Our team will reach you at 555-0104.

extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: Parent asking whether R-sound production delay is normal at age 4 and whether evaluation is warranted

items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead should review the developmental question and arrange a brief SLP consultation or screening conversation with Jordan Kim before any booking proceeds.
items.draft_reply:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you for reaching out about Ava! We completely understand wanting some guidance before taking next steps — that's a great question to ask.

Our policy is that questions about speech and development milestones are best answered by one of our licensed speech-language pathologists, rather than through a general message. We wouldn't want to give you anything less than a thoughtful, personalized response.

Here's what we'd suggest: we can connect you with one of our SLP team members for a brief phone or portal consultation to discuss Ava's development and whether a formal evaluation might be helpful. There's no obligation to book anything — it's simply a chance to get your questions answered by the right person.

If you'd like us to set that up, please reply here or give us a call and we'll get it arranged as soon as possible.

Thanks again, and we look forward to hearing from you!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy
items.decision_rationale: This message is a clinical question about speech development milestones — specifically whether R-sound delays at age 4 warrant concern. Per policy, front desk and automated systems must not provide clinical advice; the question must be routed to a clinician. Ava Kim was not found in the patient system, so this is a prospective new family. No safety or same-day operational urgency is present, so P2 is appropriate.

items.recommended_next_action: Intake staff should contact Lakeview Pediatrics / Dr. Omar Keene today to obtain the five missing fields (DOB, parent/guardian name and contact, insurance payer, member ID) before proceeding with any intake, insurance verification, or scheduling steps; the draft fax reply is ready for staff review and sending.
items.draft_reply:
Dear Dr. Keene and Lakeview Pediatrics Team,

Thank you for your referral of Sam Taylor to Cedar Kids Therapy for speech-language pathology services. We are happy to assist and want to ensure we can process this referral promptly.

Unfortunately, we are unable to proceed without the following required information:

1. Child's date of birth
2. Parent/guardian name and contact information (phone number and/or email)
3. Insurance payer name
4. Insurance member ID

Could you please resend the referral with these details completed, or contact our office directly? Once we have the complete information, we will prioritize intake and reach out to the family.

Thank you for your partnership in caring for your patients.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy – Intake Team
items.decision_rationale: This is a new referral from Lakeview Pediatrics for SLP services, but it is critically incomplete — the child's DOB, parent/guardian contact, and all insurance details are blank. No existing patient record was found under "Sam Taylor," so this cannot be matched to a prior file. Insurance cannot be verified and no slot can be held until the missing information is received; a task has been assigned to intake and a draft fax reply to the referring office is ready for staff review.

items.draft_reply:
Hola Ana, le llamamos de Cedar Kids Therapy. Recibimos su mensaje sobre la evaluación de habla para Isabella. Nos da mucho gusto poder atenderles.

Tenemos disponibilidad con nuestra terapeuta de habla bilingüe (español/inglés), Lucía Morales, el jueves 30 de abril a las 11:00 a.m. También hay otra opción el lunes 4 de mayo a las 2:00 p.m. si esa fecha le conviene mejor.

Hemos verificado su cobertura de Medicaid (miembro MCD-55320) y todo está activo. No hay copago para esta visita.

Por favor, comuníquese con nosotros al número de la clínica para confirmar la cita y así podemos enviarle los formularios de ingreso. Estamos aquí para ayudarle en cualquier paso del proceso.
